text:
is a Survey Corps soldier and former member of the 104th Training Corps.

Appearance

Sasha has hair that is kept in a ponytail that reaches the base of her neck and large eyes. Her bangs were slightly parted to the left, cascading down each side of her face. They stop around the middle of her neck. She wears the standard 104th Training Corps uniform.
